steps.title: Substitute the given value
steps.content:
The second equation gives $y=21$. Substitute that into the first equation.
$$21=3x-3$$

steps.title: Solve for the first coordinate
steps.content:
Add $3$ to both sides, then divide by $3$.
$$24=3x$$
$$x=8$$

steps.title: Write the solution pair
steps.content: The solution is $(8,21)$. The answer is B.
